label: neither
rationale: Electoral arithmetic and coalition analysis across Kisii/Nyamira/Kuria, criticism of named politicians (Onyonga, Matiangi), no collective contempt against any group.

label: offensive
rationale: 'arseholes', 'shivers down the scrotum' - crude personal abuse of named politicians (Ruto, Gachagua); the reference to Ruto's tribe is incidental colour, not a transfer of criticism onto the community.

label: neither
rationale: Warning directed at a named individual (Rigathi) about consequences of his political actions; the warning to Kikuyus is that they will bear his mess, not an attack on the community itself.

label: neither
rationale: Electoral ID-selling allegation directed at a political bloc with a rhetorical jab, but no collective ethnic contempt; 'Luo's have their Id's intact' is comparative, not dehumanising.

label: neither
rationale: A retweet about IEBC electoral concerns; no attack on any group.

rationale: 'Gachagua naye ni takataka buana' - crude personal insult directed at a named politician, not transferred onto any ethnic community.

rationale: Criticism of a named official (Matiangi) over a gate/access issue and condemnation of 'tribal nonsense' - anti-tribalism framing, not ethnic contempt.

label: neither
rationale: 'Kalonzo will only be voted na hawa Wakamba' reads as electoral-bloc voting analysis; 'Other Kenyans are fed up' expresses political dissatisfaction, not collective contempt of Kamba people.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Wantam shenzi sana' directed at all Kenyan MPs as an institutional class, not at an ethnic or protected group.

label: hate
target_group: Iranian/Persian religious community (implied: Iranian government and its people)
rationale: 'complete removal of this blight' applied to a religious/national community after dehumanising framing ('blight', 'murderous cultist') crosses into eliminationist hate.

rationale: 'Utajua hujui' is NCIC-flagged but here directed at a named individual ('kasongo') about past harm, not a veiled threat against an ethnic group.

label: neither
rationale: Factual report of Gachagua's political statement about Moses Kuria; no contempt expressed by the author.

rationale: 'baboons', 'selfish, greedy' directed at 'united opposition' as a political grouping, not at an ethnic or protected group.

label: neither
